name: PMO 日次レポート生成

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM projects WHERE (end_date >= CURDATE() OR end_date IS NULL) AND spreadsheet_id IS NOT NULL

nodes.name: 進行中プロジェクト取得
スプレッドシートデータ取得

parameters.query: DELETE FROM project_progress WHERE project_id = {{ $json.project_id }} AND resister_day = '{{ $json.today }}'
SELECT * FROM project_progress WHERE project_id = {{ $('進捗データ整形').item.json.project_id }} AND resister_day >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY resister_day, phase, task

INSERT INTO daily_reports (project_id, report_date, overall_progress, phase_summary, risks, trend) VALUES ({{ $json.project_id }}, '{{ $json.report_date }}', {{ $json.overall_progress }}, '{{ $json.phase_summary_sql }}', '{{ $json.risks_sql }}', '{{ $json.trend_sql }}') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE overall_progress = VALUES(overall_progress), phase_summary = VALUES(phase_summary), risks = VALUES(risks), trend = VALUES(trend)
